ksa_text: Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI systems, including designing human-machine interfaces for effective oversight, specifying human-in-the-loop protocols and escalation triggers, and assigning and validating competency of oversight personnel.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-004 (AG, Skill) maps to Data Analyst scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5825 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.583, eu_ai_act=0.537, dcwf=0.413. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5825 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-S-004 (AG, composite 0.5825) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5825 for AG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.583, eu_ai_act=0.537, dcwf=0.413 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5825 exceeds external evidence threshold for AG domain inclusion in Data Analyst.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5825, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
